name: Fourth Street Rose Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Whisk eggs in a large bowl.
3. Whisk sugar and flour until smooth. Set aside.
4. Cut rhubarb into small pieces and fold into the egg mixture.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
6. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 350°F and continue baking.
